headline: Say goodbye to free ChatGPT with no ads
task_prompt: Research how many days this AI chatbot remained completely ad-free from its initial public launch date until it first introduced advertisements or sponsored content. If still ad-free as of February 10, 2026, count the days from launch to today and note it is still ad-free.

results_preview.notes: Still ad-free as of Feb 2026, 14+ years
Introduced ads Feb 2026, 3.2 years after launch
Premium-only model, no free ad tier
Microsoft introduced ads 9 days after launch

key_findings: Microsoft Copilot lasted only 9 days ad-free
Siri has been ad-free for 5,242 days (14+ years)
The spread is 9 to 5,242 days - a 582x difference between fastest and slowest to monetize
evaluation.suggested_headline: How Long Can an AI Chatbot Resist Ads? Copilot Lasted 9 Days. Siri Is Going on 14 Years.
evaluation.reasoning: Perfect discrimination (582x spread), deeply timely (ChatGPT just launched ads), Copilot finding is genuinely shocking. The non-profit-turned-for-profit-turned-ad-platform framing makes the news subject the punchline.
